untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (ascending broadening wedge structure with expanding highs/lows) requires visual/geometric analysis not expressible with available technical indicators. The pattern formation itself (higher highs AND lower lows simultaneously) and wedge geometry cannot be quantified using only the allowed indicators. Breakout detection from a dynamic wedge boundary also requires pattern-specific measurement not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture SHORT direction with price breakout below a support level (pivot) and exit on -5% decline (success criterion per source). However, the core pattern recognition of the broadening wedge formation cannot be properly translated. A complete implementation would require custom pattern detection logic or explicit support/resistance level inputs.
